category_sources: source_facts.description says it loads and enumerates PKCS#11 modules; official p11-kit manual covers PKCS#11 configuration, modules, trust, and API references.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is p11-kit; official manual title and GitHub repository use p11-kit.
docs_sources: Official p11-glue generated p11-kit manual includes configuration, command manual pages, API reference, and build/contribution documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/p11-glue/p11-kit, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PKCS#11 module loading/enumeration; official p11-kit manual lists trust policy, p11-kit and trust commands, and API reference.
